item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: Whatâs likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Worries around artificial intelligence disruption and the Trump tariffs pushed stocks lower on Monday, with the Dow Industrials tumbling more than 800...

item.title: Trading volumes have surged in leveraged funds, options since the pandemic, data shows
item.description: Leveraged funds and options trading saw daily volumes grow at compound annual rates of 29% and 16%, respectively, between 2020 and 2025.

item.title: Cybersecurity stocks are the latest AI victim. Analysts say buy the dip
item.description: Analysts from across Wall Street believe that the fears are overblown, and delivered names they think will outperform the most.

item.title: Dividend-paying real estate stocks are outperforming as AI fears roil markets. Where to find opportunities
item.description: BMO is predicting REITs will move even higher.

item.title: The stars are aligning for this country ETF, says Katie Stockton
item.description: Katie Stockton takes a look at the charts on this ETF tracking South African stocks.
